itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the gud school which mainly focus on the academics and the discipline of a student . I grown in this school completely. While I were there , the teachers were highly skilled and teached me clear and at the same time, they teached me way of life and made me to grow .the individual focus is always there for a student and students is well cared by the teachers. My life is developed for to come across abroad for the studies .

itemReviewed.name: Karthigeyan Matriculation Higher Secondary School - Vadapalani

itemListElement.reviewBody: I would say...it's right place for a child to grow in studies, discipline... Teachers are very kind to students and motivates students in their tough time...Most supportive staffs.. encourages students and guides them in right path...

itemReviewed.name: Karthigeyan Matriculation Higher Secondary School - Vadapalani

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very good school....the teachers were kind and they help us to improve our knowledge...i would like to ask the management to ask physics sir and chemistry sir to teach the students numericals also...that will help the students who are trying for neet and jee....other than this the school is very safe for the children's to study...if you have any problem with the ground facilities don't worry they have a separate ground near saligramam...they will allow us to play there...so don't worry about the ground...❤️

itemReviewed.name: Karthigeyan Matriculation Higher Secondary School - Vadapalani

itemListElement.reviewBody: If I had the option to give no stars, I'd choose it ...if you just want to come and go, join here or choosing commerce join here ... If you want to study or prepare for JEE, then this will be the worst choice you ever make . They don't even have chemistry, physics, PTs, or English teachers.. ... I never had a consistent teacher since 2015... who would hire a part-time teacher for a full-time class... kids aren't even strong with their basics... management believes in the principal, who is basically ruining the school.....

itemReviewed.name: Karthigeyan Matriculation Higher Secondary School - Vadapalani

itemListElement.reviewBody: I had studied in this school .this is the worst discussion in my career . I don't think this like school . This is not worth for money . They collecting more money for this money there has not good studies  and no sports students . They na teaching us and after my studies I go for a college admission they asking the school name and then the collage rejected  me . After I joined in clg they als asked school name after that they asked me donation over 2 laks after they nons dis school after finished clg i goes for searching jobs they rejected my resume after seein my school name. And then last I am working successfully in Olympia has watchman  dis my life stry . (The moral of the stry is )one worng discussion makes your life worst.
